remaining_tasks.name: 03-04 Task 3: Visual verification checkpoint
remaining_tasks.progress: Checkpoint reached. Kanji intro reworked to fade-in with 鍛冶 kanji. Tagline decode effect reworked. Katana slash attempted but reverted. Needs fresh visual verification.

human_actions_pending.action: Visual verification of complete animation system (desktop, mobile, reduced-motion)
human_actions_pending.context: 03-04 checkpoint - animations modified during session, need fresh verification

decisions.decision: Replace 侍 with 鍛冶 (blacksmith/forge) kanji for intro
decisions.rationale: Personal branding - samurai sword maker, thematically tied to user's name

decisions.decision: Kanji intro uses fade-in instead of stroke-by-stroke drawing
Tagline: JP text → CLI '$ decode --target=tr/en' typed letter-by-letter → scramble-resolve to final text

decisions.rationale: Prevents tagline animation overlapping with intro
Turbopack HMR bug causing React Client Manifest errors on file changes

decisions.decision: Katana slash visual effect reverted to simple trail+glow+split
decisions.rationale: SVG/PNG katana attempts all failed. Keep simple for now.

next_action: Complete 03-04 visual checkpoint, then run phase verification.
context_notes: Phase 3 is 95% done. Plans 01-03 fully complete. Plan 04 has 2/3 tasks committed. Current state: fade-in 鍛冶 kanji (0.8s), slash trail+glow+shake+split (no katana blade), tagline decode with CLI '$ decode --target=xx' effect. Intro plays every reload (sessionStorage check removed). public/images/ has katana.svg and katana.png from slash attempts (untracked).
